text.p: Good day to you and your family sir.

Once again I'm deeply grateful for the willingness to supervise me , and most importantly for your assistance and concern so far. Indeed, I'm sorry for not bracing up as you would have expected me to. Since December until recently, I have not been able to give the work the needed attention owing to a number of factors. But by the special grace of God I am set for the work. For example, I have been officially relieved of a major responsiblity I hitherto saw as a serious hindrance if I must give this work the needed attention it requires. In addition, last week the management formally acknowledged my application to proceed on further studies and was formally released, although I will still be teaching some classes for the time being. I thank God for that sir.

I have already scheduled my coming down south for the second week of this month, but the actual time when I will come will depend on when you will have time for me. By the grace of God I am going to spend about three weeks there.
Finally, sir, please find attached to this message the research proposal.
